options.systemMessage: You are a strict but fair CRM instructor. Grade according to the rubric and personalize feedback by quoting student's actual words.

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.item.json;
const s = d.scores || {};

return { json: {
  "Student Name": d.student_name,
  "Student ID": d.student_id,
  "Student Email": d.student_email,
  "Total Score": s.total_score || 0,
  "Part 1 Total": s.part1_total || 0,
  "Part 1 Q1": s.part1_q1_experience_documentation || 0,
  "Part 1 Q2a": s.part1_q2a_relationship_opportunities || 0,
  "Part 1 Q2b": s.part1_q2b_communication_behaviors || 0,
  "Part 1 Q2c": s.part1_q2c_technology_personalization || 0,
  "Part 2 Total": s.part2_total || 0,
  "Part 2 Q1": s.part2_q1_recovery_script || 0,
  "Part 2 Q2": s.part2_q2_video_justification || 0,
  "Part 3 Total": s.part3_total || 0,
  "Part 3 Q1": s.part3_q1_strategy_resources || 0,
  "Part 3 Q2": s.part3_q2_team_management || 0,
  "Part 3 Q3": s.part3_q3_personal_reflection || 0,
  "🚨 Plagiarism": d.plagiarism_detected ? `YES - ${d.similarity_percentage}% match with ${d.matched_with}` : "No",
  "Graded At": new Date(d.graded_at).toLocaleString()
}};
